raw_input.student_message: My Java program keeps crashing with NullPointerException. I created a Room object but calling describe() on it blows up. I've tried adding initializers but nothing works. Can you help me figure out what I'm missing?
raw_input.error_output:

	at Game.main(Game.java:10)
